message:
fix: Use relative path for hooks configuration

- Changed hooks path from /hooks/hooks.json to ./hooks/hooks.json
- Fixes plugin manifest validation error requiring paths to start with './'
- Plugin should now install correctly from superpowers-marketplace

files.patch:
@@ -9,5 +9,5 @@
   "homepage": "https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code",
   "license": "MIT",
   "keywords": ["hooks", "automation", "workflow", "continuation"],
-  "hooks": "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/hooks.json"
+  "hooks": "./hooks/hooks.json"
 }
\ No newline at end of file
